历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Soochow University in Guangdong Physics Category were approximately 23749, 22072, 20481, 32512, and 20768 respectively. In 2024, there was an abnormal sharp decline to 32512, but in 2025 it quickly rebounded to 20768, returning to the level range of 2022–2023. Although there has been significant fluctuation in the past two years, it has stabilized in 2025. The enrollment plan for Soochow University in Guangdong Physics Category: 47 in 2021, 58 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 51 in 2024, and 50 in 2025. For 2026, the Physics Category plan is 51, and the Medical Category (Physics Category subject selection) is 4, totaling 55, an increase of 5 (+10%) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 46th, and in recent years its ranking has been stable in the 40–46 range, placing it among the upper-middle level comprehensive universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a campus safety incident (a male college student maliciously using female classmates' photos), which may have a minor negative impact on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 46th (relatively hot), indicating a certain level of social attention. Historically, there have been no obvious admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University's A- and above disciplines are Physical Education (A-) and Pharmacy (A-), totaling 2, which is a relatively small number of advantageous disciplines, limiting their boosting effect on overall admission rankings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, while Clinical Medicine maintains stable popularity. Soochow University has strong disciplinary layouts in these areas. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 15,800 (+3.59%) compared to 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, and recruits across provinces in Guangdong. In recent years, the enrollment plan in Guangdong accounts for about 3–5% of the university's total national plan, which is at a lower-middle level, so regional preference factors have limited influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Taking into account the intensified competition due to a 3.59% increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees and the slight negative impact of reputation, the ranking is adjusted upward by 200 places from 22014. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 Physics Category is approximately 22214, with a range of 21714–22714.

Soochow University has strong programs in Medicine and Computer Science, but competition is fierce, so a reasonable gradient of preferences is necessary.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Soochow University in Guangdong's History Category were approximately 2790, 5035, 3597, 3811, and 4936 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating upward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with the lowest in 2021 (2790), a significant drop to 5035 in 2022, a slight recovery in 2023–2024, and another drop to 4936 in 2025, with a total backward shift of about 2146 places over the past 5 years. The enrollment plan for Soochow University in Guangdong's History Category: 10 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 11 in 2024, and to 16 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 16 students, unchanged from 2025, with no further expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 46th, with a stable ranking in the 40–46 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving a campus safety incident, which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 46th (relatively hot), with a certain degree of social attention. There is no obvious record of admission cut-off gaps historically. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University has A- or above disciplines: Physical Education (A-) and Pharmacy (A-), totaling 2, which have limited direct appeal to History Category candidates. Liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature and Law did not receive A-level ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Journalism and Communication is clearly polarized. Law is relatively hot but highly competitive, while Journalism and Communication is notably discouraged. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.64%) from 292,200 in 2025, indicating a significant growth in candidate numbers and intensified competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, and recruits across provinces in Guangdong. In recent years, the Guangdong enrollment plan accounts for about 3–5% of the university's total national plan, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: supply_demand=4936, same as the 2025 ranking. However, the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong has increased significantly by 11.64%, and the plan has not expanded, leading to a clear increase in competitive pressure. Combined with the slightly negative reputation factor, the ranking is adjusted upward by 150 places from 4936. The predicted minimum admission ranking for the 2026 History Category is approximately 5086, with a range of 4586–5586.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 苏州大学医学类在广东省2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为：2021年5275位（计划12人）、2022年28043位（计划18人）、2023年27168位（计划13人）、2024年31886位（计划15 人）、2025年21416位（计划5人）。2025年计划从15人骤降至5人，导致位次大幅上升至21416位。2026年医学类计划进一步缩减至4人（缩招20%），其中临床医学（5年）2人、临 床医学（5+3一体化）2人。缩招趋势延续，但幅度较2025年（-66.7%）明显收窄，供需弹性计算显示位次将较2025年有所回落。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学是211工程重点建设高校、国家双一流建设高校，位于江苏省苏州市。学校综合实力位居全国前列，医学学科是其传统优势领域，临床医学等专业在长三角地区享有较高 声誉，对广东省考生具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续高涨，临床医学尤其受到高分考生青睐。苏州大学2026年在广东省医学类仅投放4个计划（全部为临床医学方向），且取消了法医学 、预防医学、护理学等相对低分专业，使得医学类整体录取门槛被推高。苏州地处长三角经济发达区域，地理位置优越，对广东考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型及专业结构调整因素，预测2026年苏州大学医学类在广东省最低录取位次约为19346位，较2025年（21416位）有所上升（位次数字减小，竞争难度略降），波 动区间预计在18862至19830位之间。建议位次在此区间内的考生积极报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Soochow University's medical programs in Guangdong Province from 2021 to 2025 are: 2021: 5275th (planned 12 students), 2022: 28043rd (planned 18 students), 2023: 27168th (planned 13 students), 2024: 31886th (planned 15 students), 2025: 21416th (planned 5 students). In 2025, the plan sharply decreased from 15 to 5 students, causing a significant rise in ranking to 21416th. In 2026, the medical program plan further reduces to 4 students (a 20% reduction), including Clinical Medicine (5-year) with 2 students and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) with 2 students. The trend of enrollment reduction continues, but the magnitude is significantly narrower compared to 2025 (-66.7%). Supply-demand elasticity calculations indicate that the ranking will decrease compared to 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Suzhou City, Jiangsu Province. The university's comprehensive strength ranks among the top in the country, and its medical disciplines are traditional strengths. Programs such as Clinical Medicine enjoy a high reputation in the Yangtze River Delta region, maintaining sustained appeal to candidates from Guangdong Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs nationwide has continued to rise, with Clinical Medicine particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. In 2026, Soochow University will only offer 4 slots in Guangdong Province for medical programs (all in Clinical Medicine directions), and has canceled relatively lower-scoring programs such as Forensic Medicine, Preventive Medicine, and Nursing, thereby raising the overall admission threshold for medical programs. Suzhou is located in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, with a superior geographical location, strongly attracting candidates from Guangdong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and adjustments in program structure, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Soochow University's medical programs in Guangdong Province in 2026 will be approximately 19346th, an increase from 2025 (21416th) (ranking number decreases, competition difficulty slightly decreases), with a fluctuation range expected between 18862nd and 19830th. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to actively apply.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For candidates within the predicted ranking range, it is recommended to focus on Clinical Medicine (5-year) as the main direction, and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) can be considered as a reach option.
